creator: chmiels@o2.pl
text:
Lenovo L420 has builtin SD card reader Realtek 5209. There is a driver for it made by Realtek.com available at:

http://www.realtek.com.tw/downloads/downloadsView.aspx?Langid=1&PNid=15&PFid=25&Level=4&Conn=3&DownTypeID=3&GetDown=false

Device is identified by:

none1@pci0:4:0:0:       class=0xff0000 card=0x21dd17aa chip=0x520910ec rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Realtek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.'
